description: Create a Current-State Value Stream Map (VSM) in EdrawMax to document a software deployment pipeline. The diagram should feature a 'Release Planning' process control connected to a 'Development Team' supplier and 'Production Users' customer via electronic information flows. Model a process flow consisting of five steps: 'Code Review' (CT: 2 hours, CO: 15 min), 'Build & Unit Test' (CT: 30 min, CO: 5 min), 'Integration Testing' (CT: 4 hours, CO: 30 min), 'Staging Deploy' (CT: 1 hour, CO: 20 min), and 'Production Deploy' (CT: 45 min, CO: 10 min). Connect these steps with push arrows and include inventory/queue wait times between them: 8 hours (Step 1 to 2), 12 hours (Step 2 to 3), 24 hours (Step 3 to 4), and 4 hours (Step 4 to 5). Include a timeline ladder that calculates and labels the Total Lead Time and Total Processing Time. Save the completed diagram as /home/ga/Diagrams/deployment_vsm.eddx.
